data.current_description: Sets the access control policy on the specified resource. Replaces any existing policy. Can return `NOT_FOUND`, `INVALID_ARGUMENT`, and `PERMISSION_DENIED` errors.
data.summary_suggestion: Set IAM access control policy
data.description_suggestion: Sets the Identity and Access Management (IAM) policy for a ManagedZone resource, replacing any existing policy completely. The request must include the full desired policy with all bindings. Returns the updated policy. May return NOT_FOUND if the resource doesn't exist, INVALID_ARGUMENT if the policy is malformed, or PERMISSION_DENIED if the caller lacks setIamPolicy permission. This operation overwrites all previous access control settings.
data.reasoning: Missing summary entirely. Description mentions error codes but lacks context about policy replacement semantics and side effects. Added IAM terminology, clarified that the entire policy is replaced (not merged), explained what the request must contain, and emphasized the destructive nature of this operation for AI agent safety.
